reviews.review_description: I think this game is a great time consumer.  I downloaded it while it was in free early access, but I'd genuinely pay for this!
Haven't seen anything like this lots of fun

Update from my last review that I put in I figured out since then the issue with the game it wasn't the game It was my play space I had to update it cuz it was reading my old play space and when it reads old play spaces with old objects your space glitches

developer_response.body: Hey YoungHippie0099, thanks for updating us and glad it's sorted. All the best :)

reviews.review_description:
I really like this but I have one major issue with it. I can get to about Wave 7 or 8 without losing a ship and gathering about $10-20k. But as it starts to get harder in the later waves, I lose a LOT of cash, and by the time the game ends, I usually end up with $400-$500, or sometimes even a negative amount. I think the game should be changed so that you can't lose money earned in previous waves.

I am ranked around 30th in all the leaderboard categories so it's not to say I'm just rubbish at it :D 

Also, it would be good if there was some more up-front explanations of the various power-ups and hazards. I typically found myself encountering things for the first time and not knowing what they did, e.g. don't land purple raider ships. It was only after I encountered them that I looked at the in-game manual which explained what they are.

Update: Thanks for the developer response and clarifying the scoring system. I've also just spotted that some of power ups that you can buy reduce the cost of losing ships and increase the reward for landing them among other things so I'll try purchasing some of them to make some of later waves (8+) less punishing. I had previously looked at power ups when I started playing and thought they were just for upgrading some of the bonuses like Hammer. I had been focusing on upgrading aeroes instead.

Update 2: After various upgrades I got to Wave 26 and ranked 3rd in the leaderboard for best run score. And also soaked in sweat. Updating to 5 stars.

Check out my YouTube for my first impressions video but this is a no brainer to pick up while it's free! Plenty of ships, upgrades and power ups to unlock and will.have you running around your room like a madman!
😁✌️☮️❤️

This is my first review here on the app store but I had to give credit where credit is due. This game is something special for MR. The graphics are great. The physical activity of playing the game is great.

What I think would take it to another level ENTIRELY, and make this a game that could have Fortnite like legs…  MULTIPLAYER in the same space to introduce a competitive aspect to things. Add that and you have the next Beat Saber sports-like hit for the Quest.
Lots of good fun arcade type gameplay. Lots of potential as the premise is simple to understand and it becomes very addictive. Looking forward to seeing how it evolves.

Fun game idea reminiscent of some old phone games, but turned up a notch being 3D in your home! Power ups are pretty self explanatory. For some reason I couldn't access the tutorial, and I can only grab one ship at a time (may be intended that way, but I'm not sure without the tutorial). Easy to pick up by itself though, and a good active game!

I like this new game very much! It's simple to understand and an original concept. It takes place in your room (I personally really enjoy mixed reality games) and it's beautifully executed, with nice lights effects. The UI is futuristic. Overall, a real pleasure.
Simply game but very addictive. Determined 5 stars.

reviews.review_title: Fast-paced scifi game with great graphic
reviews.review_description:
If you like to action games this is one for you, forget about sitting on a chair and chill.
This is chaos, fast paced, with great scifi vibes, hammer  power up is really great

Very cool MR game. This game is fun to play and can be even more fun to watch someone play! Transport your room into a galactic hub for space ships and you be the galactic traffic controller. Certainly a worthwhile game to play and a great one to use to show new people to VR because of the comforting MR. Good luck! 😁 🧑‍🚀🚀🛸

Starts calmly but within a moment you’re frantically moving about the room. Really makes the most of VR movement. Leaderboards, unlocks and a banging soundtrack keep me coming back again for “just one more go!”

Not only does this game manage to get you up and out of your seat but it does a great job of making everything fun. The graphics are great, the ships are cool and the gameplay feels tough but rewarding. Not much more you could ask for!

It’s very fun at first, but can get very repetitive after not having much to do other than guiding all of the ships. Speaking of guiding ships, it is very easy to accidentally start guiding the wrong one. Could use a bit of polishing, but overall, a pretty good game.
Turn it on, crank out a few rounds then put it down or keep going. This is a great MR app that can be fast paced but never frustrating. I’d strongly recommend and have no complaints.

I've finally found a game that makes me sweat more than Beat Saber :-D
Nice graphics, good background music and a frenetic gameplay.
To be honest I wasn't expecting much but this is a really fun game, very simple at the start but gets increasingly manic as the levels get harder.
This is a great game to keep you moving in your environment, I am limited on space and the game was very playable and fun to use

reviews.review_title: Such a nice cool MR game to find
reviews.review_description: I love the game style and cool use of my room space, and was not expecting it to be so challenging after a bunch of levels! It's so intuitive and quick to pick up I managed to get a few in my family to try it out for the best scores
Intuitive gameplay, and a great example of MR gaming. Starts off easy, gets frantic quickly.

reviews.review_title: Thanks for telling me this on TikTok
reviews.review_description: Best game ever if you don’t install then WHAT ARE YOU DOING INSTALL IT NOW and play!!!!

reviews.review_title: Really cool game gets you moving
reviews.review_description: Super addictive and fun to upgrade. Managed to get a high score of over 7 million with not too many upgrades. See if you can get a higher score than that
Fun, cute mixed reality game that's easy to learn and gets you moving around your space.
I love airtraffic control, I literally have to jump off my couch to lead some of the ships. Gives a good workout near level 5
This is really good, thank you Devs, I need a bigger room!

reviews.review_title: Easy , fun and will keep you moving !
reviews.review_description: Great game , addictive to try and level up , brilliant in mixed reality! Hooked already .
Glad I installed it. It's fun, fast paced,  and the graphics are good.
Don't be a fool. Just get the game.

Easy to play reminds me of the plane landing game on me phone but made much better the price shud b higher add a co op game were 2 landing pads are either side of room and U cud hav frantic fun with a friend or barge Ur brother or sister out the way

reviews.review_title: This is the future of gaming!
reviews.review_description: MR, AR and XR is the future of gaming and this is a shining example of thinking WAY outside the box providing something truly entertaining and original!!! A+++

This is a really fun game for MR,  the models feel so realistic and when my girlfriend was playing and jumping around for the high flying ships, I really noticed how much you really move around the room.
Give it a try, you'll be surprised.
Just played this game enjoyed it good game in the making can’t wait to see we’re it goes  keep up the good work guys 👍
A very unique game with engaging mechanics and lots of replay-ability, do not miss this one!

reviews.review_title: Super fun and a great workout
reviews.review_description: Put the chair away and get ready for a great time.
